title: kentrophyllum tingitanum
intro: Kentrophyllum tingitanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae, native to the island of New Caledonia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Kentrophyllum tingitanum typically involve extracting its leaves and roots to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
